## Content Type

Select one:
- Incoterm explanation
- Scenario
- Cost simulator text
- Translation (ID/EN)
- Other

## Location

Where is the content now?
- Page:
- File path (if known):
- Section or title:

## Current Content

Paste the current text.

## Proposed Content

Paste your improved text.

## Why This Change Is Needed

Explain why this is more accurate, clearer, or more useful.

## References (Optional but Preferred)

If this is technical or regulatory, include source links (ICC, customs docs, etc.).
